case_title: PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC VS. ANITA SEGOVIA et al

docket_entries.description: WITHDRAWAL OF REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC SERVED MAR-09-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, ANITA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $269.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, ANITA
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF 1) INTEREST, 2) 1033 (B)(2) NOTICE, AND 3) REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, ANITA $2,211.10 PRINCIPAL, $427.23 INTEREST, $269.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,907.33, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINNACLE CREDIT SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SEGOVIA, ANITA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2009
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
